case_title: EICHOLD ELIZABETH JANE VS HELTBERG ROBERT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EICHOLD ELIZABETH JANE AS TO DEFENDANT HELTBERG ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HELTBERG ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT EICHOLD ELIZABETH JANE NEITHER SIDE ABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
